name: dynamic-grid
title: DynamicGrid
description: A technical grid that drifts diagonally — the GridField primitive on a frame-driven translate that loops by one cell, so it's seamless and deterministic. Optional centered accent glow. Full-canvas atmosphere for data / dev scenes.
pickWhen: the scene reads as dashboard / data / dev — a grid signals "technical" without competing. Use `mesh-gradient` for warmer atmosphere.
